steps.name: coverage-gap-ranking
steps.summary: WCE1 added scripts/workflow_coverage_gap_ranking.py, tests/test_workflow_coverage_gap_ranking.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-wce1-coverage-gap-ranking.md. It ranked 1037 provisions, disclosure/closing support, 1036 impairment, 1113 fair value, and 1110 consolidation by firm-service value, data availability, determinism, and low verification cost; recommended 1037_provisions as the WCE2 workflow contract candidate.

steps.name: first-new-workflow-candidate-contract
steps.summary: WCE2 added scripts/first_workflow_contract.py, tests/test_first_workflow_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-wce2-first-workflow-contract.md. It turns WCE1's 1037_provisions recommendation into a machine-readable decision-prep contract with structured local fact inputs, primary K-IFRS/supporting/client-private evidence roles, outputs, human-review boundary, and not-implemented limits.

steps.name: minimal-review-pack-adapter
steps.summary: WCE3 added scripts/minimal_workflow_review_pack_adapter.py, tests/test_minimal_workflow_review_pack_adapter.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-wce3-minimal-review-pack-adapter.md. It emits a structured 1037 provisions review-pack draft from structured local facts, including recognition assessment, measurement summary, journal entry cue, missing facts, authority panel, confidence, limitations, and human-review checklist.

steps.name: coverage-metric-update
steps.summary: WCE4 added scripts/workflow_coverage_metric_update.py, tests/test_workflow_coverage_metric_update.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-wce4-coverage-metric-update.md. It records 1037_provisions as one conditional decision-prep workflow candidate in the objective coverage map, preserves the existing 24 review-pack automation snapshot, and explicitly avoids claiming full automation.
